rationale.R1.3: The output does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift.
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression.
